entity.summary: Brazilian centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in October 2017. Ripio acquired BitcoinTrade in January 2021 and continued operating the platform during a gradual integration. On June 19, 2023, the BitcoinTrade brand was formally retired and the exchange became Ripio Trade without an interruption of trading services.
entity.notes: HEI keeps BitcoinTrade as a historical predecessor entity rather than merging its entire lifetime into Ripio. The old domain now serves Ripio-branded trading content. The active successor is represented by the existing Ripio entity `hei_ex_000055`; this record's terminal state is rebrand rather than acquisition because the BitcoinTrade name continued for more than two years after the January 2021 purchase.

events.title: BitcoinTrade launched in Brazil
events.description: BitcoinTrade began operating as a Brazilian cryptocurrency exchange on October 20, 2017.
events.notes: Contemporary launch coverage provides an exact operating-start date.

events.title: Ripio acquired BitcoinTrade
events.description: Ripio acquired BitcoinTrade as part of its expansion in Brazil and Latin America while the exchange continued under the BitcoinTrade name.
events.notes: The acquisition did not immediately terminate the brand or service.

events.title: BitcoinTrade became Ripio Trade
events.description: BitcoinTrade formally changed its name to Ripio Trade after integration into the Ripio brand ecosystem, while platform services continued.
events.notes: HEI uses the formal June 19 brand transition as the BitcoinTrade terminal marker.

evidence.title: BitcoinTrade enters the national virtual currency market
evidence.notes: Contemporary report states that BitcoinTrade began operations in Brazil on October 20, 2017.

evidence.title: Ripio announces acquisition of Brazilian exchange BitcoinTrade
evidence.notes: First-party acquisition announcement identifies BitcoinTrade as a Brazilian exchange founded in 2017.

evidence.title: Argentina's Ripio Acquires Second-Largest Crypto Exchange in Brazil
evidence.notes: Independent report corroborates Ripio's acquisition of BitcoinTrade.

evidence.title: BitcoinTrade becomes Ripio Trade
evidence.notes: Official announcement states that the BitcoinTrade brand would become Ripio Trade on June 19, 2023 and that services would continue.

evidence.title: BitcoinTrade changes name and becomes Ripio Trade
evidence.notes: Independent report confirms the formal June 19 rebrand and full integration into Ripio.
